title: Every Level of Hermes Agent Explained
summary: Jack Roberts explains a seven-level progression model for building Hermes agents, from simple prompting to autonomous operating systems that manage multi-agent workflows. The tutorial covers integration of Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Grok through a unified agentic platform with skills, orchestration, and scheduled task execution.
writeup: The video lays out a seven-level progression for building Hermes agents, moving from basic prompting up to autonomous operating systems that coordinate multi-agent workflows. It demonstrates routing across Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Grok through a single agentic platform that adds skills, orchestration, and scheduled task execution. Key takeaways include how model routing, agent skills, subagents, and MCP fit into each level of the stack.
